name: Zettelkasten
description: Generates configurable note IDs and inserts links supporting those IDs using the Zettelkasten method. Usage Select 'Insert Zettelkasten ID' from the menu will create a unique ID into your file. You can configure the ID pattern to your liking in the script options, using an ECMAScript regeg. Then you can insert from an other document a link to the first one, using the 'insert Zettelkasten link' from the menu. You can select the correct link using a filter from filename or the ID, and it will create a [[filename|ID]] wiki-links to notes. The detection pattern has also to be configured into the plugin options, to match the ID generation (the default option will match the preconfigured ID pattern anyway).
